manual.student.gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
manual.student.gettingStarted.summary: Home page, entry URL, and lesson lock status
manual.student.gettingStarted.s1.heading: Overview
manual.student.gettingStarted.s1.body: Open /student or / to enter the e-learning app. Home shows course title, classroom, and teacher announcements.
manual.student.gettingStarted.s2.heading: First steps
manual.student.gettingStarted.s2.step2: Check if lessons are locked or unlocked (card on the right)
manual.student.gettingStarted.s2.tip: No extra setup needed — wait for the teacher to unlock lessons.
manual.student.pretest.title: Pre-Test
manual.student.pretest.summary: 10 image-based questions and optional music intro
manual.student.pretest.s1.heading: Taking the Pre-Test
manual.student.pretest.s1.body: From Home tap "Start Pre-Test" or pick it from the sidebar.
manual.student.pretest.s1.step1: Read each question and view the image
manual.student.pretest.s1.step2: Tap the image to open the lightbox
manual.student.pretest.s1.step3: Select an answer and tap Next until all 10 questions are done
manual.student.pretest.s2.heading: Music before Pre-Test
manual.student.pretest.s2.body: If enabled by the teacher, you will see a music screen before the quiz — Pre-Test only.
manual.student.pretest.s2.step2: Wait until the track ends (or skip if allowed)
manual.student.lessons.title: Lessons & Navigation
manual.student.lessons.summary: Sidebar, bottom bar, swipe, and keyboard
manual.student.lessons.s1.heading: Navigation
manual.student.lessons.s1.step1: Use the menu icon (mobile) or sidebar (desktop)
manual.student.lessons.s1.step3: Swipe left/right on mobile (not on quiz pages)
manual.student.lessons.s2.heading: Fullscreen
manual.student.lessons.s2.body: Tap the fullscreen button top-right for distraction-free reading.
manual.student.postTest.title: Post-Test
manual.student.postTest.summary: Available when the teacher unlocks it after lessons
manual.student.postTest.s1.heading: Requirements
manual.student.postTest.s1.body: Post-Test stays locked until the teacher enables content and Post-Test.
manual.student.postTest.s1.step3: Answer all 10 questions — pass mark is 60%
manual.student.announcements.title: Announcements & FAQ
manual.student.announcements.summary: HTML announcements, QR codes, and FAQ
manual.student.announcements.s1.heading: Teacher announcements
manual.student.announcements.s1.body: Shown on Home — may include text, links, images, or QR codes.
manual.student.announcements.s2.heading: FAQ
manual.student.announcements.s2.body: See FAQ on Home or browse the full manual here.
manual.student.devices.title: Devices & Platforms
manual.student.devices.s1.heading: Phone & tablet
manual.student.devices.s1.step1: Use latest Chrome, Safari, or Edge
manual.student.devices.s1.step2: Layout stacks vertically with large tap targets
manual.student.devices.s2.heading: Desktop
manual.student.devices.s2.body: Use arrow keys or Page Up/Down to change pages (except on quiz pages).
